testcase.name: test_login_invalid_credentials

failure.message: AssertionError: Should reject invalid credentials assert 400 in [401, 403] + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e2e_comprehensive.py:73: in test_login_invalid_credentials assert response.status_code in [401, 403], f"Should reject invalid credentials" E AssertionError: Should reject invalid credentials E assert 400 in [401, 403] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_currencies_endpoint

failure.message: assert ('INR' in dict_keys(['success', 'currencies']) or 'inr' in "dict_keys(['success', 'currencies'])") + where "dict_keys(['success', 'currencies'])" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb93c9ad6610>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb93c9ad6610> = "dict_keys(['success', 'currencies'])".lower + where "dict_keys(['success', 'currencies'])" = str(dict_keys(['success', 'currencies']))

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e2e_comprehensive.py:285: in test_currencies_endpoint assert "INR" in currencies or "inr" in str(currencies).lower() E assert ('INR' in dict_keys(['success', 'currencies']) or 'inr' in "dict_keys(['success', 'currencies'])") E + where "dict_keys(['success', 'currencies'])" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb93c9ad6610>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb93c9ad6610> = "dict_keys(['success', 'currencies'])".lower E + where "dict_keys(['success', 'currencies'])" = str(dict_keys(['success', 'currencies']))

testcase.name: test_chatbot_message
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e2e_comprehensive.py:323: in test_chatbot_message assert response.status_code == 200, f"Chatbot failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Chatbot failed: {"success":false,"error":"Access denied. Your IP has been temporarily blocked.","errorCode":"ACCESS_DENIED"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_chatbot_empty_message
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e2e_comprehensive.py:335: in test_chatbot_empty_message assert response.status_code in [200, 400] E assert 403 in [200, 400] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_chatbot_clear_session
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e2e_comprehensive.py:344: in test_chatbot_clear_session assert response.status_code in [200, 204] E assert 403 in [200, 204] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
